scenarios.title: Logged-Out Web Scrape
scenarios.summary: Unusual patterns in logged-out web traffic against web.phantomfeed.io. Determine if automated scraping is happening and identify the responsible clients.

scenarios.title: Logged-In Mobile API Abuse
scenarios.summary: A partner reported possible automated activity against m.phantomfeed.io. Authenticated traffic with mixed personas — find the bad actor and explain what they're doing.

scenarios.title: Insider — Credentialed Data Exfiltration
scenarios.summary: An SOC tip suggests an employee may be exfiltrating data before leaving for a competitor. 60 days of authenticated traffic across five related tables. Detect deviation from baseline while ruling out documented role changes and PTO.

scenarios.title: The Living Investigation — 30-Day Cat-and-Mouse
scenarios.summary: Thirty days of an evolving attack. Reconstruct eight distinct phases of attacker tactics and defensive responses from the logs alone. The capstone scenario.
